text: Docker networking provides container connectivity. Drivers: bridge (default, containers on same host), host (container shares host network), overlay (multi-host, Swarm), macvlan (container gets MAC address, appears as physical device), none (isolated). Custom networks enable DNS-based service discovery.
Bridge: Docker creates docker0 bridge, containers get IP from 172.17.0.0/16 subnet.
user-defined networks (DNS resolution: container names resolve).
Port mapping: `-p 8080:80` maps host 8080 to container 80.
